title: Budget Info in the Funding Opportunity Announcement (FOA) — Special Workshop Slides (Silver)
display_label: Budget Info in the FOA Slides (2022-12-09)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2022-12-09 Cost Allowability Special Workshop, second presentation 'Budget Info in the Funding Opportunity Announcement (FOA)' by Gillian Silver, MPH, CPH. Teaches researchers how to extract the budget-relevant information embedded in a federal FOA so they can build a compliant proposal budget.
